input.question: How many professors work in each department?

payload.question: How many professors work in each department?

output.sql:
WITH dept_prof_counts AS (
  SELECT d.id AS department_id,
         d.name AS department_name,
         COUNT(p.id) AS professor_count
  FROM departments d
  LEFT JOIN professors p ON p.department_id = d.id
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name
)
SELECT department_id, department_name, professor_count
FROM dept_prof_counts
ORDER BY professor_count DESC, department_name ASC;

visualization.description: Number of professors in each department
visualization.title: Professors per Department

payload.sql:
WITH dept_prof_counts AS (
  SELECT d.id AS department_id,
         d.name AS department_name,
         COUNT(p.id) AS professor_count
  FROM departments d
  LEFT JOIN professors p ON p.department_id = d.id
  GROUP BY d.id, d.name
)
SELECT department_id, department_name, professor_count
FROM dept_prof_counts
ORDER BY professor_count DESC, department_name ASC;
